# @usdctofiat/offramp

USDC-to-fiat offramp SDK for Base. Create delegated deposits in one function call.

## SDK

Package: @usdctofiat/offramp (npm)
Install: npm install @usdctofiat/offramp

```ts
import { Offramp, PAYMENT_PLATFORMS, CURRENCIES } from "@usdctofiat/offramp";
const offramp = new Offramp();
```

## Methods

Deposits:
- offramp.createDeposit(walletClient, params, onProgress?) - create a delegated offramp deposit (approve → register → deposit → confirm → delegate). Returns { depositId, txHash }
- offramp.getDeposits(walletAddress) - list all deposits for an address. Returns DepositInfo[] with status, balance, fills, delegation state
- offramp.withdrawDeposit(walletClient, depositId, escrowAddress?) - close a deposit and withdraw remaining USDC. Returns tx hash

Discovery:
- offramp.getPlatforms() - list supported payment platforms with currencies, identifier labels, helper text
- offramp.getCurrencies(platform) - get supported currency codes for a platform
- offramp.getCurrencyInfo(code) - get currency metadata (symbol, name, countryCode). Returns CurrencyInfo | null
- offramp.getAllCurrencies() - get all supported currencies with metadata. Returns CurrencyInfo[]
- offramp.validateIdentifier(platform, identifier) - validate and normalize a payment identifier. Returns { valid, normalized, error? }

## React Hook

```ts
import { useOfframp } from "@usdctofiat/offramp/react";
const { createDeposit, getDeposits, withdrawDeposit, step, txHash, depositId, error, isLoading, reset, getPlatforms, getCurrencies, validateIdentifier } = useOfframp();
```

## Typed Constants

Use these for autocomplete and compile-time safety:
- PAYMENT_PLATFORMS.REVOLUT, .WISE, .VENMO, .CASHAPP, .CHIME, .MERCADO_PAGO, .ZELLE, .PAYPAL, .MONZO, .N26
- CURRENCIES.USD, .EUR, .GBP, .AUD, .CAD, .SGD, .CHF, .JPY, .AED, .MXN, .INR, .BRL, .HKD, .NZD, .PLN, .TRY, .ZAR, .SEK, .NOK, .DKK, .CZK, .HUF, .RON, .THB, .CNY, .IDR, .ILS, .KES, .MYR, .VND, .UGX, .PHP, .SAR, .ARS, .KRW, .TWD, .CLP, .COP, .PEN

## Types

```ts
type Platform = "venmo" | "cashapp" | "chime" | "revolut" | "wise" | "mercadopago" | "zelle" | "paypal" | "monzo" | "n26";
type Currency = "AED" | "ARS" | "AUD" | ... | "USD" | "ZAR"; // 39 currencies

interface OfframpParams {
  amount: string;      // USDC decimal, min 1
  platform: Platform;  // use PAYMENT_PLATFORMS constant
  currency: Currency;  // use CURRENCIES constant
  identifier: string;  // platform-specific username/email
}

interface OfframpResult { depositId: string; txHash: string; }

type OfframpStep = "approving" | "registering" | "depositing" | "confirming" | "delegating" | "done";

interface OfframpProgress { step: OfframpStep; txHash?: string; depositId?: string; }

interface PlatformInfo {
  id: Platform;
  name: string;
  currencies: string[];
  identifierLabel: string;
  identifierPlaceholder: string;
  helperText: string;
}

interface CurrencyInfo {
  code: string;        // "EUR"
  name: string;        // "Euro"
  symbol: string;      // "€"
  countryCode: string; // "eu"
}

type DepositStatus = "active" | "empty" | "closed";

interface DepositInfo {
  depositId: string;
  compositeId: string;
  status: DepositStatus;
  remainingUsdc: number;
  outstandingUsdc: number;
  totalTakenUsdc: number;
  fulfilledIntents: number;
  paymentMethods: string[];
  currencies: string[];
  rateSource: string;
  delegated: boolean;
  escrowAddress: string;
}
```

## Errors

```ts
import { OfframpError } from "@usdctofiat/offramp";
// error.code: "VALIDATION" | "APPROVAL_FAILED" | "REGISTRATION_FAILED" | "DEPOSIT_FAILED" | "CONFIRMATION_FAILED" | "DELEGATION_FAILED" | "USER_CANCELLED" | "UNSUPPORTED"
// error.step?: OfframpStep (which step failed)
// error.txHash?: string (if deposit was created on-chain)
// error.depositId?: string (if deposit was confirmed but delegation failed)
```

## How It Works

createDeposit orchestrates 5 steps, 3 of which are wallet transactions:
1. Approve USDC allowance (wallet tx)
2. Register payee details (API call, no signature)
3. Create deposit on-chain (wallet tx)
4. Confirm deposit ID from receipt or indexer (automatic)
5. Delegate to the Delegate vault (wallet tx)

The SDK reports progress via onProgress callback with these states plus a final "done" signal. Steps 1, 3, and 5 each require a wallet signature.

All deposits are:
- Delegated to the USDCtoFiat Delegate vault (mandatory)
- Market-tracking via oracle-based pricing (no manual rate setting)
- Auto-closing when fully filled (retainOnEmpty: false)
- Attributed to Galleon Labs via ERC-8021
- On Base network (chain ID 8453)

## Supported Platforms

| Platform | Currencies | Identifier |
|----------|-----------|-----------|
| Revolut | 23 currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, SGD, NZD, AUD, CAD, HKD, MXN, SAR, AED, THB, TRY, PLN, CHF, ZAR, CZK, CNY, DKK, HUF, NOK, RON, SEK) | Revtag |
| Wise | 30+ currencies | Wisetag |
| PayPal | USD, EUR, GBP, SGD, NZD, AUD, CAD | Email |
| Venmo | USD | Username |
| Cash App | USD | Cashtag |
| Zelle | USD | Email |
| Monzo | GBP | Username |
| N26 | EUR | IBAN |
| Chime | USD | ChimeSign |
| Mercado Pago | ARS | CVU |

## Links

- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@usdctofiat/offramp
- usdctofiat.xyz: https://usdctofiat.xyz
- Delegate vault: https://delegate.usdctofiat.xyz
- Protocol: https://zkp2p.xyz
